title: clematis × lawsoniana var. henryi
intro: Clematis × lawsoniana var. henryi is a flowering plant in the genus Clematis, known for its vibrant purple flowers and attractive foliage. It is primarily used in ornamental horticulture for its decorative value and ability to provide a source of nectar for pollinators. While it has some potential medicinal properties, more research is needed to confirm its efficacy, but it may have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. However, its main use is as a decorative plant, and herbal preparations are not well-established; it's often used in teas, infusions, or as a dried herb, although its use is mostly for its ornamental and pollinator-attracting properties.
